ddt:Target.Name: LDW_ECU_X07_X62 v2.7
ddt:Target.Description:
** 05/10/2011 Initialisation de la base DDT de la caméra frontale permettant l'alerte sortie de voie (LDW) et la commutation automatique code/phare (AHL) Pilote : Altran (S.CHANSAVANG) Sce : 65608
23/01/13 : Mise à jour du champ auto ident
09/07/2013 : Mise à jour du champ auto ident
14/11/2013 : Ajout projet X62 + Modification des données de traçabilité ($2184)
03/05/2014 : Ajout projet X62 pour le paramètre "Vehicle Type" + Mise à jour du champ auto ident pour X62
Pilote: Assystem ( A. TAFIHI)
16/04/2015 : - Modification des écrans de calibration specifique à l'APV et à l'usine - Correction de la séquence de l'auto-aiming - Ajout des nouvelles version soft X07 et X62

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias lvl out of range/zero adjustmt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or syst operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: RoutineEntryOption
Data.Comment: = "Routine" input parameters

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: Headlamps type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Distance of target from front axle center
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 65535mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 3825 mm with a resolution of 15

Data.Name: Tolerance of height from Z
Data.Comment: Value between -255 and 255 mm with a resolution of 2

Data.Name: Vehicle type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 5 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Traceability serial number
Data.Comment: production umber in the week

Data.Name: Traceability year of production
Data.Comment: Year of production

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Vehice Spare Part Number

Data.Name: Steering wheel angle
Data.Comment: Value between -3276 and 3276 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Region
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 255 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: LDW push button state
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 1 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: Supply voltage
Data.Comment: Value between 6 and 18 with a resolution of 0.1

Data.Name: Windshield type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: Vehicle speed
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 255 km/h with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: ECU internal temperature
Data.Comment: Value between -40 and 86 °C with a resolution of 2

Data.Name: Vehicle width
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 4000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 3000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Roll angle
Data.Comment: Value between -3 and 3 ° with a resolution of 0.001

Data.Name: Distance between target
Data.Comment: specific parameter for plant setup 65535mm with the resolution of 1

Data.Name: LDW push button LED state
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 1 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: Pitch angle default value
Data.Comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.001

Data.Name: Pitch angle after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.0001

Data.Name: PartNumberLowerPart
Data.Comment: 5 derniers digits de la référence pièce

Data.Name: SupplierITGNumber
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: SoftwareVersion
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SoftwarePartNumberDaimler
Data.Comment: used for the double referencement

Data.Name: Traceability Constant value
Data.Comment: Constant value

Data.Name: Traceability Month and Day of production
Data.Comment: Month and Day of production

Data.Name: X_offset after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between 170 and 190mpix with a resolution of 0.001

Data.Name: HardwarePartNumberDaimler
Data.Comment: used for the double referencement

Data.Name: IndexNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: FailuresDetect.All
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

DataItem.Name: Traceability Month and Day of production

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position from the ground.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position from the ground.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position

Request.Name: DataRead.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

Request.Name: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Request.Name: DataRead.Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground

Request.Name: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground
Height of the center of target from the ground
Distance of target from front axle center
Height of the center of target from the ground
Distance of target from front axle center

Display.DataName: Traceability Month and Day of production

DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
DataWrite.Camera position from the ground.Z position
DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center
DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

Display.RequestName: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Display.DataName: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Display.DataName: Distance of target from front axle center
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Distance of target from front axle center

Display.DataName: Height of the center of target from the ground
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Height of the center of target from the ground

Display.RequestName: DataRead.Camera position from the ground.Z position

Input.DataName: Distance of target from front axle center
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

Input.DataName: Height of the center of target from the ground
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

Input.DataName: Camera position from the ground.Z position
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position from the ground.Z position

Input.DataName: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Input.DataName: Camera position in the vehicle.X position
Input.RequestName: DataWrite.Camera position in the vehicle.X position

Input.DataName: Height of the center of target from the ground
Distance of target from front axle center

Label.Text: 2 - Check the auto-aiming status ( Please wait 30s after the start routine calibration)
Tolerance of height from Z = 0 mm
Distance from target to front axle center = 3000mm
Height from the center of target to the ground = 1450mm
